items.scenarioAnalysisDescriptionBestEN:
In the worst case scenario under the stress test, only 100% Principal Amount could be returned and the annual rate of yield could be [ 0.1% ] if the Product is held to the Maturity Date.

The following scenario analysis is done using analog data. Estimated yield does not equal actual yield. Please exercise caution when you invest.

Assuming:
Initial Fixing Rate: [ 140.1300 ]; Range 1: [ 135.23 , 135.93 ]; Range 2: [ 133.82 , 141.53 ]

If the Expiry Reference Rate is [ 135.5000 ], i.e., is within Range 1.

Annual Rate of Yield= [ 5.0% ]

items.scenarioAnalysisDescriptionBestCN:
在压力条件下的最不利投资情形为持有本产品至到期日仅取回100%投资本金，年化收益率为[ 0.8% ]。

以下分析使用模拟数据。测算收益不等于实际收益，投资需谨慎。

假设：初始参考汇率: [ 0.6100 ]; 区间1: [ 0.6069 , 0.6222 ]; 区间2: [ 0.5856 , 0.6588 ]

如果最终参考汇率厘定在[ 0.6200 ]，即在区间1的范围内

年化收益率 = [ 4.0% ]
